        private static global::NovaSharp.LuaValue __NovaSharpGeneratedIndex(SaveApi instance, global::System.ReadOnlySpan<global::NovaSharp.LuaValue> args)
        {
            if (instance == null)
            {
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(instance));
            }
            if (args.Length != 2)
            {
                throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua metamethod '__index' expects 2 argument(s).");
            }
            if (args[1].Kind != global::NovaSharp.LuaKind.String)
            {
                return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.Nil;
            }

            string key = args[1].AsString();
            switch (key)
            {
                case @"Name":
                    return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.FromString(instance.Name);
            }

            return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.Nil;
        }

        {
            if (instance == null)
            {
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(instance));
            }
            if (args.Length != 3)

                throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua metamethod '__newindex' expects 3 argument(s).");

                throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua member keys must be strings.");

            string key = args[1].AsString();
            switch (key)

                    throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua member 'Name' is read-only.");
